response.overview: The Whiskey crew returns for another chaotic season of snowboarding, partying, and pushing their luck on and off the mountain. Packed with huge jumps, brutal crashes, backcountry lines, street sessions, and the anything-goes energy of 1990s snowboard culture, Whiskey 3 captures a group of riders determined to go faster, fly higher, and have as much fun as possible along the way.
response.tagline: Bigger airs. Harder slams. More bad decisions.
response.title: Whiskey 3
